title: Step 1 — Digital Intake Becomes a Ready Chart
description: The patient completes intake on their device and the staff queue updates without manual re-entry. The visit starts before check-in does.

title: Step 2 — Technician Workup Carries Into the Exam
description: Without ChartNav, physicians rebuild the visit. With it, the chart is prepared by the technician and ready before the physician opens it.

title: Step 3 — Imaging Lands Where the Physician Needs It
description: OCT, fundus, and visual-field studies route into the correct encounter context — not into a parallel viewer the physician has to chase.

title: Step 4 — Hands-Free Scribing While You Examine
description: Dictate during the exam — ChartNav captures the transcript, structures it into a SOAP draft, and hands it back ready to sign. No keyboard, no clicking, no scribe in the room.
overlay: Physician → hands stay on the patient

title: Step 5 — Consult Letters Generated From the Signed Note
description: Once the note is signed, the referring-provider letter renders from the encounter record. No re-typing into a separate letter tool.
overlay: Consult letter → generated from the note

title: Step 6 — Operational Metrics Without Spreadsheet Chasing
description: Leadership opens the operations panel and reviews approvals, blocked notes, and identity in one place. Claims don't disappear into a black box.
